# vanims.txt — real Portal 2 v_portalgun animation, baked per PART.
# Transforms are CAMERA-RELATIVE (the anim data poses the arm chain into view),
# so the chip draws each part as  eyeMatrix * frameTransform  — game-exact placement.
clip fire 30 16
